subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath ever been supreme in power, exalted, holy, sanctified, peerless, self-subsisting, unique and one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی لم یزل کان مقتدرا متعالیا مقدسا منزها فردا صمدا وترا واحدا
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
